name.ja: <ruby>心を見通す眼<rt>マインド・スキャン</rt></ruby>

text.en: While you have a "Toon" card in your field or GY, your opponent must keep their hand revealed, also you can look at their Set cards at any time. If you have a Toon monster and a "Toon" Spell in your field and/or GY: You can declare 1 card name that is not among the cards/effects activated in this Chain; negate the activated effects of cards with that original name until the end of this turn, while this card is face-up on the field. You can only use this effect of "Mind Scan" once per turn.
